_comment: Provenance + integrity manifest for the externally-authored golden corpus. Every .fits is authored by CFITSIO 4.6.4 (the interop/c/gen_sources.c program and/or fpack 1.7.0); the .csv is an Astropy 5.3.x cross-check sidecar. Regeneration is byte-deterministic (interop/README.md). test/golden.zig hashes each entry's bytes (sha256, relative to test/golden/) and decodes each through the public fits API to the expected values. Do not edit by hand: run `make -C interop golden`.

toolchain.astropy: 5.3.4 (numpy 1.26.4) — cross-check sidecar only, never authors .fits bytes

files.generator: fpack -C -r (RICE_1) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-32 identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/RICE_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255

files.generator: fpack -C -g1 (GZIP_1) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-32 identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/GZIP_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255

files.generator: fpack -C -h -s 0 (HCOMPRESS_1, lossless) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-32 identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/HCOMPRESS_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255 (lossless)

files.generator: fpack -C -h -s -16 (HCOMPRESS_1, ABSOLUTE lossy scale 16, SMOOTH=0) over a CFITSIO 32x32 BITPIX-16 curved surface (pixel[r*32+c] = r*r + 2*c*c + r*c), 32x16 tiles
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/HCOMPRESS_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) reproduces tile_hcompress_lossy16_expected.fits (funpack's decode) bit-exactly

files.generator: funpack -C over tile_hcompress_lossy16.fits (the authoritative CFITSIO lossy decode)
files.expected: HDU 1 BITPIX-16 32x32 image; the exact pixels zigfitsio must produce from the paired .fz

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c fits_img_compress (HCOMPRESS_1, fits_set_hcomp_scale(-16) = ABSOLUTE 16, fits_set_hcomp_smooth(0)) over the 32x32 BITPIX-32 curved surface, 32x16 tiles
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/HCOMPRESS_1 ZVAL2=0; TiledImage.readAll(i32) reproduces tile_hcompress_lossy32_expected.fits bit-exactly

files.generator: funpack -C over tile_hcompress_lossy32.fits
files.expected: HDU 1 BITPIX-32 32x32 image; the exact pixels zigfitsio must produce from the paired .fz

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c fits_img_compress (HCOMPRESS_1, ABSOLUTE scale 16, fits_set_hcomp_smooth(1)) — identical stream to tile_hcompress_lossy32.fits, differing ONLY in ZNAME2='SMOOTH'/ZVAL2=1 (fpack has no smooth flag, hence the API author)
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/HCOMPRESS_1 ZVAL2=1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) applies hsmooth and reproduces tile_hcompress_smooth_expected.fits bit-exactly; must DIFFER from the lossy32 expected pixels (non-vacuous)

files.generator: funpack -C over tile_hcompress_smooth.fits (funpack honors ZVAL2 and applies hsmooth)
files.expected: HDU 1 BITPIX-32 32x32 image; the exact smoothed pixels zigfitsio must produce from the paired .fz

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c fits_img_compress (HCOMPRESS_1, SUBTRACTIVE_DITHER_1, quantize level 4, fits_set_dither_seed(1) — fpack's clock-derived ZDITHER0 is non-deterministic) over a 32x32 BITPIX--32 LCG noise+gradient field, default 32x16 tiles
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/HCOMPRESS_1 ZQUANTIZ=SUBTRACTIVE_DITHER_1 ZDITHER0=1; TiledImage.readAll(f32) reproduces tile_hcompress_fdith_expected.fits (funpack's dequantized decode) bit-exactly

files.generator: funpack -C over tile_hcompress_fdith.fits (the authoritative CFITSIO dequantized decode)
files.expected: HDU 1 BITPIX--32 32x32 image; the exact f32 pixels zigfitsio must produce from the paired .fz

files.generator: fpack -C -h -q0 4 (HCOMPRESS_1, NO_DITHER quantization, level 4 — seed-free, so fpack authors it deterministically) over the same 32x32 BITPIX--32 noise field
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/HCOMPRESS_1 ZQUANTIZ=NO_DITHER; TiledImage.readAll(f32) reproduces tile_hcompress_fq0_expected.fits bit-exactly

files.generator: funpack -C over tile_hcompress_fq0.fits
files.expected: HDU 1 BITPIX--32 32x32 image; the exact f32 pixels zigfitsio must produce from the paired .fz

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c fits_img_compress (RICE_1, SUBTRACTIVE_DITHER_1, quantize level 4, fits_set_dither_seed(1)) over the same 32x32 BITPIX--32 noise field, default 32x1 row-strip tiles
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/RICE_1 ZQUANTIZ=SUBTRACTIVE_DITHER_1 ZDITHER0=1; TiledImage.readAll(f32) reproduces tile_rice_fdith_expected.fits bit-exactly

files.generator: funpack -C over tile_rice_fdith.fits
files.expected: HDU 1 BITPIX--32 32x32 image; the exact f32 pixels zigfitsio must produce from the paired .fz

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c fits_img_compress (RICE_1, SUBTRACTIVE_DITHER_1, quantize level 4, fits_set_dither_seed(1)) over a 32x32 BITPIX--64 LCG noise+gradient field offset to ~1000 (f32 grid spacing 2^-14 ≫ the dither term, so any f32 funnel in the dequantization is observable), default 32x1 row-strip tiles
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/RICE_1 ZBITPIX=-64 ZQUANTIZ=SUBTRACTIVE_DITHER_1 ZDITHER0=1; TiledImage.readAll(f64) reproduces tile_rice_ddith_expected.fits (funpack's full-double dequantized decode) bit-exactly (hunt 2026-07-06 item 41)

files.generator: funpack -C over tile_rice_ddith.fits (the authoritative CFITSIO full-double dequantized decode)
files.expected: HDU 1 BITPIX--64 32x32 image; the exact f64 pixels zigfitsio must produce from the paired .fz (pins the double-precision dequantization path, hunt 2026-07-06 item 41)

files.generator: fpack -C -p (PLIO_1) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-16 positive identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/PLIO_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 26-byte-row ASCII TABLE (I10,E15.7) + deterministic DATASUM/CHECKSUM
files.expected: HDU 2 DATASUM card == 1837006711; checksum.datasum() recomputes 1837006711; checksum.verify() == {data: match, sum: match}

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 8x4 BITPIX-16 primary image
files.expected: HDU 1 image; ImageView.readAll(i16) yields value[i] == i - 8 for i in 0..31

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 5x3 BITPIX-32 (float) primary image with an IEEE-NaN null at index 7
files.expected: HDU 1 image; raw read isNaN at index 7; value[i] == i*0.25 elsewhere; null_sentinel read maps index 7 to the sentinel

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 3-row BINTABLE (1J INDEX, 1E FLUX, 1D DVAL, 8A NAME)
files.expected: HDU 2 BINTABLE; INDEX=[10,20,30], FLUX=[1.5,2.5,3.5], DVAL=[0.25,0.5,0.75], NAME=[alpha,beta,gamma]

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 3-row ASCII TABLE (I6 ID, F12.4 FLUX, A5 NOTE)
files.expected: HDU 2 ASCII TABLE; ID=[100,200,300], FLUX=[3.1416,2.7183,1.4142], NOTE=[aaa,bbb,ccc]

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 64x64 BITPIX-16 image with a RA---TAN/DEC--TAN celestial WCS (CRPIX 32,32; CRVAL 150.0,2.5; CDELT -6e-4,6e-4)
files.expected: Wcs.fromHeader + Celestial.fromWcs; pixelToWorld matches wcs_refpoints.csv rows within 1e-6 deg

files.generator: Astropy 5.3.4 wcs_pix2world(..., 1) over wcs_tan.fits (cross-check sidecar; NOT a .fits)
files.expected: header 'px,py,ra_deg,dec_deg'; 1-based pixels; reference pixel (32,32) -> (150.0, 2.5)

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: clean 4x4 BITPIX-16 primary image
files.expected: validate.verify yields zero .err findings

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 4x4 BITPIX-32 (float) image carrying an illegal BLANK keyword
files.expected: validate.verify yields a finding (hdu 1, severity err, kw BLANK); fitsverify also reports 1 error

files.generator: hand-written conformance expectation spec (mirrors the consumer asserts)
files.expected: documents the valid/malformed expectations the consumer enforces
